case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. HUNG YEE SEWING CO.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT HUNG YEE SEWING CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNG YEE SEWING CO. $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $5.03 INTEREST, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $154.03, TOTAL $154.03
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT HUNG YEE SEWING CO.
